---
title: "Courses"
description: "Courses taught and developed."
---

::: {.courses-table}
| Course No. | Level | Institute | Role | Title | Years |
|------------|-------|-----------|------|-------|-------|
| AI 839 | Mixed | IIIT-B | Instructor | [AI in Production](https://mlsquare.github.io/ai-839/) | 2024 |
| UE17CS325 | Undergrad | PESU | Instructor | Artificial Intelligence | 2020 |
| STAT 689 | Grad | TAMU | Partial Instructor | Advanced Bayesian Methods | 2009 |
| STAT 211 | Undergrad | TAMU | Instructor | Principles of Statistics I | 2009 |
| STAT 201 | Undergrad | TAMU | Instructor | Elementary Statistical Inference | 2006, 07, 08 |
:::
